---
page-layout: custom
css: [styles/homepage.css]
---

{{< include _includes/_layout_start.qmd >}}

![](/img/sifnos_HCB.jpg){.main-photo}
[Sifnos, Greece (1961) | Henri Cartier-Bresson]{.photo-credit}

Howdy, I'm a research technician at IMP, Vienna with [Sven Klumpe](https://www.imp.ac.at/groups/sven-klumpe) and at UBC, Vancouver with [Khanh Dao Duc](https://kdaoduc.com/about/).

My general interests are in biology, software and mathematics. I have done work in structural biology infrastructure (atomic models, CryoET), ML applications to cryoEM, shape analysis. I built and maintain [ribosome.xyz](https://ribosome.xyz/).

Outside of academia, I've had a few backend roles. I enjoy running, hiking, canoeing, music, history, economics. I planted around 250,000 trees in the north-west of Canada between 2016 and 2018. My favorite books are by Proust, Eco and McCarthy. I live in Vienna now.

[rtkushner@gmail.com](mailto:rtkushner@gmail.com).

{{< include _includes/_layout_end.qmd >}}
